candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Cost of Goods Sold
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears directly beneath the selected parent total 'Cost of Goods Sold' and alongside 'Other Cost of Goods Sold', indicating it is a component already embedded in the selected COGS total.
This appears to be a balancing/helper row with no values, not an operating expense line to add separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the total 'Cost of Goods Sold'. The explicit COGS D&A row is a sub-component of that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.why: This sits beneath the selected parent row 'Sales and marketing expenses' and above 'Other Sales and marketing expenses', so it reads as a component already included in the selected sales and marketing total, not a separate same-level row to add.
This appears to be a lower-level component beneath the sales and marketing section, and therefore already contained within the selected SG&A bucket rather than a separate add-on.

These rows appear as sub-components under the selected parent 'Research and development expenses'. Because 'Research and development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, separately adding R&D-related D&A would risk distortion/double counting.

This appears directly beneath the selected parent 'Administrative Expenses' and above 'Other Administrative Expenses', indicating it is a component already included in the selected administrative total.
This line exists in the preview but has no values and does not function as a usable separate operating D&A row here.
This line exists in the preview but has no values and does not function as a usable separate operating D&A row here.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is composed of the parent totals 'Sales and marketing expenses', 'Research and development expenses', and 'Administrative Expenses'. Visible D&A-related rows appear to be nested components within those totals, not separate same-level operating rows. R&D is also already separately selected in XRD, so no R&D D&A row should be added separately.
